author: y4rr
content:
Expanded foreach on-device path to 10 more optimizers: adam (+AMSGrad), adagrad, rmsprop (+centered+momentum), adamax, nadam, radam (+rectified branch), adadelta, asgd, ema, swa (SWA+EMA). 27 new parity tests; optim suite 295 -> 322 passing, workspace 3946 -> 3974. Plus fixed 5 pre-existing unused-Result warnings in adafactor/sparse_adam tests. Shared foreach_utils module provides elemwise_max + scalar-on-device helpers reused across all ports.

Remaining 7 (rprop, adafactor, muon, lbfgs, sparse_adam, natural_gradient, grad_scaler/grad_accumulator) are documented as out-of-scope for the foreach pattern:
- rprop: sign-based update inherently requires elementwise branching
- adafactor: factored second-moment matmul over row/col reductions
- muon: Newton-Schulz matrix orthogonalization 
- lbfgs: line search requires loss closure re-evaluation
- sparse_adam: sparse gradient semantics conflict with dense tensor-op path
- natural_gradient: K-FAC matrix factor storage
- grad_scaler / grad_accumulator: utility wrappers, no update to express
